gates.title: Range Fit
gates.summary: Range, beam, reach or operating envelope assumptions match target use.

gates.title: Drinking Safety
gates.summary: Water treatment outputs are reviewed against drinking-water safety constraints.

gates.title: Sequence Fit
gates.summary: Process order and component sequence are compatible with the target system.

gates.title: Contact Time
gates.summary: Filter, reactor or process residence/contact time is considered where relevant.

gates.title: Pressure
gates.summary: Operating and test pressure assumptions are checked against components.

gates.title: Manufacturability
gates.summary: Design can be manufactured with target process, tolerance and cost assumptions.

gates.title: Geometry
gates.summary: Geometry, clearances, envelopes and interfaces are checked for consistency.

gates.title: Serviceability
gates.summary: Maintenance, replacement and assembly/disassembly access are considered.

gates.title: Liquidity
gates.summary: Market/security liquidity and practical execution constraints are considered.

gates.title: Tool Contract Fit
gates.summary: Tool input, output, permissions and callback contract match runtime expectations.
